name: longbridge
description: Agent skills for Longbridge Securities: quotes, charts, fundamentals, valuation, portfolio, news, and market research across HK, US, A-share, and Singapore markets.

interface.shortDescription: Market data and portfolio workflows for Longbridge Securities.
interface.longDescription: Longbridge bundles 13 skills for live quotes, K-line charts, options, warrants, fundamentals, research, portfolio and account data, watchlists, news, filings, market intelligence, earnings analysis, quantitative strategies, and value investing across HK, US, A-share, and Singapore markets. It supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English.
